message:
docs(plan): 10 surgical fixes based on selective feedback review

Improvements based on critical evaluation of external feedback:

Section 23.2 - Pattern normalization:
- Use LazyLock for pre-compiled regexes (was compiling every call)
- Cross-platform path handling (Windows paths, hyphens, dots)
- Track distinct projects via HashMap for correct project_count

Section 23.3 - Coverage analysis:
- Batch scoring approach replaces O(N×search) scalability issue
- HashMap deduplication for graph nodes, sorted output for stability

Section 24.2 - NEW: Error taxonomy with MsError enum:
- Categorized as Transient/Permanent/ResourceExhaustion
- RetryDecision, exit codes, user-friendly hints

Section 24.3 - Rate limiting:
- RateLimitHandler takes closure FnOnce()->Fut (not Future)
- Robust header parsing: unix timestamps + RFC3339 + HTTP-date

Section 24.5 - Graceful degradation:
- Added trait bounds T: Serialize + DeserializeOwned
- Configurable health endpoints (not hardcoded GitHub)

Section 25.3 - Versioning:
- Proper SQL schema with explicit columns
- Separate installed_skills table (available vs pinned distinction)

Section 28.7 - NEW: Interactive TUI Wizard (ms mine --guided):
- 5-step guided Brenner Method skill extraction
- BrennerWizard state machine with vim-style keybindings

Section 31.5 - Safety:
- Replaced unsafe mem::zeroed() Deferred with OnceCell-based impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
